mood: Submerged hush with a warm human trace inside a pinked understory field.
lighting: Low indirect haze with milky pink diffusion, broad overexposed mids, and one localized butter-warm highlight that blooms softly without becoming a central glow.
object_inventory: translucent vertical partitions with uneven opacity
one suspended tapered veil-form left of center
a right-side understory tangle of rootlike filaments
small sleeve-like panels half-buried in haze
warm pooled gloss interruptions near the lower field
negative_constraints: no legible words, logos, labels, or alphanumeric marks
no dashboard, browser, desktop, cards, shelves, or archive wall
no literal cooking scene, bowl, plate, fork, or kitchen props
no greenhouse, conservatory, observatory, monument, or forge core
no hard central halo, no marbling chamber, no wetland reeds

no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
